name: Atlas CLI
description: Installs the Atlas CLI (atlasgo.io) for database schema management and migrations.

version.description: Version of the Atlas CLI to install. Use 'latest' or a specific version like '1.2.0'.

flavor.description: Atlas flavor to install. Selecting one of the extended drivers (oracle, snowflake, spanner, databricks) installs the extended Atlas build with that driver. Leave empty for the default build.
